questions.q: The 5-year biodiversity project launched by MoEFCC and NBA is titled?
options: Strengthening Institutional Capacities for Securing Biodiversity Conservation Commitments
National Biodiversity Governance and Community Conservation Project
Grassroots Biodiversity Integration and Livelihood Programme
Biodiversity Management and Panchayat Empowerment Scheme
questions.exp: MoEFCC and NBA launched the project titled 'Strengthening Institutional Capacities for Securing Biodiversity Conservation Commitments' in April 2026 for Sathyamangalam (TN) and Garo Hills (Meghalaya).

questions.q: The MoEFCC-NBA biodiversity project carries a grant of USD 4.88 million and is supported by GEF and which other organisation?
questions.exp: The project (2025–2030) is supported by the Global Environment Facility (GEF) and the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) with a grant of USD 4.88 million.

questions.q: Six border villages were included under Vibrant Villages Programme Phase II in which district of Jammu & Kashmir?
questions.exp: Six villages — Bobiya, Kadyala, Gajnal, Karol Krishna, Rathua, and Gujjar Chak — in Kathua district, J&K, were included under VVP-II in April 2026.

questions.q: Vibrant Villages Programme Phase II (VVP-II) was approved with a total budget outlay of:
questions.exp: VVP-II was approved in April 2025 with Rs 6,839 crore outlay, covering all International Land Borders (except the northern border already under VVP-I).

questions.q: DRDO unveiled Advanced Armoured Platforms under which programme to replace the BMP-2K Sarath IFVs?
questions.exp: The platforms were developed under the Future Infantry Combat Vehicle (FICV) programme at VRDE lab, Ahilyanagar, Maharashtra, unveiled by DRDO Chairman Dr. Samir V Kamat.

questions.q: The Advanced Armoured Platforms unveiled by DRDO are manufactured by which two companies?
questions.exp: The platforms are produced by Tata Advanced Systems Limited (TASL) and Bharat Forge Limited (BFL), with support from MSMEs.

questions.q: IITM Pune commissioned an X-Band Dual-Polarization Doppler Weather Radar at Mahabaleshwar under which initiative?
questions.exp: The radar at HACPL, Mahabaleshwar (~1,400 m altitude) is part of Mission Mausam, the government's initiative to make India a Weather-Ready Nation.

questions.q: The SMILE–Beggary Survey Mobile App was launched by MSJE during Chintan Shivir 2026 held in which city?
questions.exp: The MSJE launched the SMILE–Beggary Survey Mobile App during the Chintan Shivir held in Chandigarh (Punjab) from 24–26 April 2026.

questions.q: As per Knight Frank's Wealth Report 2026, India ranked 6th in UHNWIs with how many ultra-high net-worth individuals?
questions.exp: India had 19,877 UHNWIs in 2026, accounting for 2.8% of the world's ultra-wealthy population, as per Knight Frank's 20th edition of The Wealth Report 2026.

questions.q: In Knight Frank's Wealth Report 2026, India ranked 3rd globally in the number of billionaires with how many?
questions.exp: India had 207 billionaires in 2026, making it 3rd globally after USA (914) and China (485), with a 58% increase over the last 5 years.

questions.q: Mission Jagrook, a nationwide investor awareness campaign, was launched at the foundation day of which regulatory body?
questions.exp: Union Minister Nirmala Sitharaman launched Mission Jagrook at SEBI's 38th Foundation Day in Mumbai, aimed at protecting retail investors from misinformation and fraud.

questions.q: RBI approved the re-appointment of B. Ramesh Babu as MD & CEO of Karur Vysya Bank for which term?
questions.exp: RBI approved B. Ramesh Babu's re-appointment for a third two-year term from July 29, 2026 to July 28, 2028 as MD & CEO of Karur Vysya Bank.

questions.q: India topped the medal tally at ISSF Junior World Cup 2026 held in Cairo, Egypt with how many total medals?
questions.exp: India topped the ISSF Junior World Cup 2026 (April 19–27) in Cairo, Egypt with 16 medals — 5 Gold, 6 Silver, and 5 Bronze.

questions.q: Who won the Gold medal in Men's 10m Air Pistol at ISSF Junior World Cup 2026?
questions.exp: Shiva Narwal won the individual Gold in Men's 10m Air Pistol at the ISSF Junior World Cup 2026 in Cairo, Egypt.

questions.q: India will host SAFF Women's Championship 2026 at which venue in Goa?
questions.exp: The SAFF Women's Championship 2026 (May 24–June 7, 2026) will be held at Pandit Jawaharlal Nehru (Fatorda) Stadium, Margao, Goa.

questions.q: Sabastian Sawe became the first athlete to run a sub-two-hour marathon in a competitive race at London Marathon 2026 with a time of:
questions.exp: Kenyan athlete Sabastian Kimaru Sawe completed the 42.2 km London Marathon 2026 in 1:59:30, the first sub-two-hour marathon in a competitive race.

questions.q: FIDE joined the International World Games Association (IWGA) as its how many member?
questions.exp: FIDE officially joined the IWGA as its 40th member during AGM 2026 in Lausanne, Switzerland, marking a key step in recognising 'mind sports'.

questions.q: Raghu Rai, who passed away in April 2026, was known as the 'Father of Indian Photojournalism'. He was awarded the Padma Shri in which year?
questions.exp: Raghu Rai was awarded the Padma Shri in 1972 in the field of Art. He was also the first Indian photographer nominated to Magnum Photos (1977) by Henri Cartier-Bresson.

questions.q: The theme for World Malaria Day 2026 (April 25) was:
options: Driven to End Malaria: Now We Can. Now We Must.
questions.exp: The theme for World Malaria Day 2026 was 'Driven to End Malaria: Now We Can. Now We Must.' First observed on April 25, 2008.

questions.q: April 25, 2026 marked which edition of International Delegate's Day?
questions.exp: April 25, 2026 was the 7th International Delegate's Day. It was first observed on April 25, 2020, declared by UNGA Resolution A/RES/73/286 in 2019.
